_publications._publicationTitle: Hexokinase 2 displacement from mitochondria-associated membranes prompts Ca

_contextSnippet: cl‐HK2pep, Fig 1 G) is indeed able to enter cells, to interact with mitochondria (Fig EV2 A), and to induce HK2 detachment from MAMs in < 2 min
details: cl-HK2pep induces HK2 detachment from MAMs in < 2 min
